reason: How configurators enumerate templates (collectTemplates pattern); the canonical contract R1 depends on. Sub-agent must follow this when adding return-value to per-platform configure().
Manifest (.template-hashes.json) schema, hash key contract (POSIX), interaction with rename/delete migration entries. R3 pruneOrphanManifestKeys must not break migration semantics.
Pre-release manifest continuity check + create-manifest.js workflow. This fix ships as a patch release (0.5.15 / 0.6.0-beta.x) and must include a manifest entry describing the prune.
Test anti-patterns (no hardcoded counts, no tautological tests). New R4 tests must follow these.
Pattern for fs-driven integration tests (spawn real trellis CLI in temp dir). All R4 init+uninstall scenarios are integration-shaped.
PRD with R1–R4 final scope, reproductions for both darknoll (.codex/sessions/) and kkz-01 (AGENTS.md), homedir guard implementation sketch, pruneOrphanManifestKeys helper signature.
